title: nephrolepis equilatera
intro: Nephrolepis equilatera, also known as the Boston fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties that help to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Nephrolepis equilatera include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Nephrolepis equilatera is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion to harness its medicinal properties, and can also be used in the form of a tincture or ointment for topical applications.
